U1.description: Of the four cited locations in m6_verdict.md §1 (L930, L972, L985-987, L1517-1518) only L1517-1518 contains a 'M6' token in the baseline CMB.txt. The other three cited line numbers contain no 'M6' token and do not have an unambiguous re-mapping.

U2.description: m6_verdict.md §1 names L1518 explicitly ('replace M6 with M6.CC in CMB.txt L1518') but the actual M6 token in this bullet is at L1517; L1518 is the continuation line. The bullet runs L1517-L1518 as a single semantic unit, so the intent is unambiguous, but a strict L1518 grep finds no M6 token.
U2.evidence: claims.jsonl C5; cmb_amendment_target_log.md §'Read-context check on the one matching site'
U2.next_step: Synth re-spec corrects L1518 → L1517 alongside other line-number fixes

U3.description: m6_verdict.md §'Reasoning' §3 explicitly cites picture v1.18 line numbers (e.g. 'picture v1.18 L979-980'). The L972 and L985-987 numerical ranges in §1's CMB.txt cite happen to fall close to picture-v1.18 line numbers around the M9-gating clause and §S6c. It is plausible the verdict author intermixed picture-v1.18 and CMB.txt line indices in §1's parenthetical CMB.txt cite, despite the prefix 'CMB.txt'. The exact-match L1517 cite is consistent with CMB.txt indexing, so the cite is at minimum partially CMB.txt-side.
U3.evidence: m6_verdict.md §3 picture-v1.18 cite pattern; L972 in CMB.txt = 'B.5/W-crosswalk verdict has not yet been substrate-merged' (no M6 token); L985-987 in CMB.txt = U1/U2/U3 unexpected-finds enumerate (no M6 token)
U3.next_step: Synth re-spec disambiguates which line numbers are CMB.txt-side vs picture-v1.18-side

U4.description: If the cited L930 was meant for L941 (CMB.txt-side, +11 offset) and L985-987 was meant for L993 (CMB.txt-side, +6–8 offset), the consistent positive offset is consistent with the verdict being drafted while CMB.txt was concurrently growing (e.g. earlier audit text being appended between draft and post-047 SYNTH-TRACK landing). Alternative is the picture-v1.18-cite-confusion hypothesis (U3). The two hypotheses are not mutually exclusive.
U4.evidence: cmb_amendment_target_log.md §'Why do not auto-relocate matters here'
